title: Pixel Plus
description: Vanilla+ meets Cobblemon in your next wonder-filled Minecraft adventure!
body: Pixel Plus is a Vanilla+ modpack for Fabric 1.20.1 centered around the Cobblemon mod and your Pokémon filled adventures. Not only does this pack include a number of additions and enhancments to the base Cobblemon mod, but through mods like Create and Farmer's Delight, we hope to elevate Vanilla mechanics and gameplay. This modpack also includes cutting-edge performance enhancing modifications to ensure a reliable and enjoyable Minecraft experience. So grab your Pokémon and prepare yourself for a breathtaking journey across the overworld and beyond!
